name: Spinner Ring
css: @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .ring { width: 48px; height: 48px; border: 2.5px solid #1e1e1e; border-top-color: #f5f5f5; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.8s linear infinite; }

name: Dual Ring
css: @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .dual-ring { width: 48px; height: 48px; border: 2.5px solid transparent; border-top-color: #fff; border-bottom-color: #fff; border-radius: 50%; animation: spin 0.9s linear infinite; }

name: Three Dots
css: @keyframes bounce { 0%, 80%, 100% { transform: scale(0); } 40% { transform: scale(1); } } .dots { display: flex; gap: 6px; } .dots span { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #fff; border-radius: 50%; animation: bounce 1.4s infinite; } .dots span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.2s; } .dots span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }

name: Bar Pulse
css: @keyframes bar { 0%, 40%, 100% { height: 8px; } 20% { height: 24px; } } .bars { display: flex; gap: 4px; align-items: flex-end; } .bars span { width: 6px; height: 8px; background: #fff; animation: bar 1s infinite; } .bars span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s; } .bars span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.2s; } .bars span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.3s; }

name: Square Flip
css: @keyframes flip { 0% { transform: rotate(0); } 50% { transform: rotateY(180deg); } 100% { transform: rotateY(180deg) rotateX(180deg); } } .sq { width: 32px; height: 32px; background: #fff; animation: flip 1.2s infinite linear; }

name: Wave Loader
css: @keyframes wave { 0%, 40%, 100% { transform: scaleY(0.4); } 20% { transform: scaleY(1); } } .wave { display: flex; gap: 4px; } .wave span { width: 6px; height: 24px; background: #fff; animation: wave 1.2s infinite; } .wave span:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s; } .wave span:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.2s; } .wave span:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.3s; } .wave span:nth-child(5) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }

name: Ripple
css: @keyframes ripple { 0% { transform: scale(0.2); opacity: 1; } 100% { transform: scale(1.4); opacity: 0; } } .ripple { width: 48px; height: 48px; border: 2px solid #fff; border-radius: 50%; animation: ripple 1.2s infinite; }

name: Dash Loader
css: @keyframes dash { 0% { stroke-dasharray: 1, 150; stroke-dashoffset: 0; } 50% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -35; } 100% { stroke-dasharray: 90, 150; stroke-dashoffset: -124; } } .dash { width: 48px; height: 48px; } .dash circle { fill: none; stroke: #fff; stroke-width: 3; stroke-linecap: round; animation: dash 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; }

name: Orbit
css: @keyframes orbit { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } } .orbit { width: 48px; height: 48px; border-radius: 50%; position: relative; } .orbit span { width: 10px; height: 10px; background: #fff; border-radius: 50%; position: absolute; top: 0; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); animation: orbit 1s linear infinite; transform-origin: 50% 24px; }

name: Fade Loader
css: .fade { width: 48px; height: 48px; position: relative; } .fade::before, .fade::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid transparent; border-top-color: #fff; animation: spin 1s linear infinite; } .fade::after { animation-delay: -0.5s; opacity: 0.5; } @keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

name: Progress Pulse
css: @keyframes prog { 0% { width: 0%; } 50% { width: 80%; } 100% { width: 0%; } } .prog { height: 4px; width: 0%; background: #fff; animation: prog 1.4s infinite; }
